title: passiflora lobbii subsp. obtusiloba
intro: Passiflora lobbii subsp. obtusiloba, commonly known as the obtusilobed yellow granadilla, is a species of flowering plant in the passionflower family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and other conditions. The herbal preparations of Passiflora lobbii subsp. obtusiloba include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
